name: public_health_port_security_scanner_northpine_auto_ben
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health port security scanner northpine auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Keisha Park
agents.identity: I am Keisha Park, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Hughes
agents.identity: I am Keisha Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Park must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Keisha Park do?
